title: openscap bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[1.3.13-1.0.1]
- Add oracle cpe names to internal cpe dictionary [Orabug: 33493979]
- Drop OpenELA branding

[1.3.13.openela.1.0]
- Add OpenELA to openscap

[1.3.13-1]
- Rebase to the latest upstream version (RHEL-133977)
- Add note that oscap xccdf eval --local-file only works with SCAP 1.3 data streams (RHEL-74343)
full_text:
[1.3.13-1.0.1]
- Add oracle cpe names to internal cpe dictionary [Orabug: 33493979]
- Drop OpenELA branding

[1.3.13.openela.1.0]
- Add OpenELA to openscap

[1.3.13-1]
- Rebase to the latest upstream version (RHEL-133977)
- Add note that oscap xccdf eval --local-file only works with SCAP 1.3 data streams (RHEL-74343)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0369.html
